issue_summary: Introduced usage of nullable annotations for API validation.
javadoc_before:
/**
			 * Returns whether the given {@link Field} matches the defined {@link PropertyMatch}.
			 *
			 * @param name must not be {@literal null}.
			 * @return
			 */
javadoc_after:

			 * Returns whether the given {@link Field} matches the defined {@link PropertyMatch}.
			 *

			 * @return
